exemplar.title: How and by how much can the ability of a soccer player in the sport be improved in a short time frame?

detailedExemplarData.title: How and by how much can the ability of a soccer player in the sport be improved in a short time frame?

strengths: Use of filmed training sessions provides concrete, reviewable evidence of ATL skills in practice
Application of the SpielerPlus app illustrates strong self-management and organizational skills
Critical analysis of research validity and acknowledgment of methodological constraints shows high-level thinking
Clear description of communication strategies and active listening instances
Balanced time management between academic, personal, and project commitments supports sustainable execution
weaknesses: OPVL analysis lacks explicit identification of the ATL skills applied and their impact on outcomes
Insufficient detail on specific communication sub-skills (verbal, non-verbal) and examples tied to project feedback
General reference to self-management without specifying which sub-skills (e.g., goal-setting, stress management) were practiced
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: The student effectively documents and reflects on multiple ATL skillsâparticularly in self-management, organization, and communicationâusing tangible tools like video evidence and structured apps. To deepen this section, they should clearly name the ATL sub-skills used in each context and connect them to measurable impacts on both learning and product development.

strengths: Clear, concise checklist of next steps demonstrating effective short-term planning and goal orientation
weaknesses: Absence of specific, measurable success criteria to evaluate goal achievement
Lack of a detailed timeline, task sequencing, and explicit resource allocation
Weak linkage of personal interests to concrete activities or milestones
Inconsistent citation formatting across the bibliography
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: While the student has shown strong short-term organization through a well-constructed to-do list, the overall plan would benefit from more precision. Defining measurable criteria, establishing a sequenced schedule with resources, strengthening the connection between personal interests and project tasks, and ensuring uniform citation style will elevate the plan from a basic framework to a robust, actionable blueprint.

strengths: Insightful acknowledgment of measurement inaccuracies paired with concrete plans (e.g., laser timers) for methodological improvement
Comprehensive list of potential product enhancements, showing forward-looking critical reflection
Quantitative evaluation of product success against criteria demonstrates analytical rigor
Well-structured player profile template reflects thoughtful consideration of user needs
weaknesses: Reported performance gains (e.g., +15%) are not directly compared to predefined success criteria
Iterative changes to the product are listed without explicit reflection on how each adjustment aligns with project goals
Evaluation often lacks direct reference to the original success criteria, leaving the reflective loop incomplete
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: The reflection section displays strong critical thinking, especially in identifying flaws and proposing substantive improvements. To close the reflective loop fully, the student needs to tie their measured outcomes and design iterations back to the original, clearly defined success criteria, demonstrating how each change contributed to meeting those standards.

annotations.comment: Your learning goal is clearly stated, but you need to define specific, measurable success criteria (e.g. percentage improvement targets) to evaluate when and how your goal is achieved precisely.
You link personal interests to your goal, but consider adding concrete examples of activities or milestones to strengthen the connection and guide your research and training design.

Your product goal outlines developing a profile and collecting data but lacks a detailed plan with timelines and resource allocation; include sequencing of key tasks and required equipment to ensure feasibility.
Filming a training session provides concrete evidence of your ATL skills in action; this documentation strengthens your ability to reflect on and refine your teaching strategies.
Your OPVL analysis shows critical thinking, but make explicit which ATL skills you applied during research (e.g. information literacy) and link them to outcomes in your project.
Analyzing article limitations demonstrates reflection on research validity; highlighting methodological constraints shows effective application of critical thinking ATL skills.
Your clear checklist of next steps shows good short-term planning; consider extending this to include longer-term milestones and deadlines for comprehensive project management.
Using the SpielerPlus app to structure sessions shows strong self-management and organizational ATL skills in action; this systematization supports consistent training delivery.
You report a +15% average improvement but do not tie this back to your success criteria; reflect on which percentage gains meet your defined measures of success.
Your acknowledgment of measurement inaccuracies shows insightful reflection on data validity; planning concrete improvements (e.g. laser timers) strengthens future methodological rigor.
You selected communication as your key ATL skill but provide limited evidence of its sub-skills; link specific instances (e.g. feedback sessions) to verbal and non-verbal communication categories.
You list changes made to your product but donât reflect on how these iterations improved alignment with your goals; consider linking each change explicitly to your success criteria.
Identifying self-management for your product is apt; enhance this by describing which sub-skills (e.g. goal-setting or stress management) you practiced and how they influenced outcomes.
Your bibliography shows breadth of sources but formatting is inconsistent; ensure all citations follow a single style guide to uphold academic rigor.
Your potential improvements list shows strong critical reflection; prioritizing these improvements in a follow-up plan will maximize the productâs reliability and impact.
Quantitative successâcriteria evaluation demonstrates thorough reflection; strengthening this by referencing your initial criteria definitions would close the reflective loop.
You articulate how you ensured accuracy and honesty in data collection, reflecting strong principled behavior and integrity in your ATL skill application.
You describe multiple communication strategies and active listening instances, demonstrating clear application of communication ATL skills in context.
Your balanced approach to time management between school, training, and the project shows strong self-management ATL skills and supports sustainable project execution.
Your player profile template is clear and wellâstructured, reflecting thoughtful reflection on user needs; consider user testing feedback to refine content hierarchy.
